update.foreach: UPDATE budget_balance SET pool_id = #{item.poolId}, quota_id = #{item.quotaId}, morg_code = #{item.morgCode}, project_code = #{item.projectCode}, custom_code = #{item.customCode}, account_subject_code = #{item.accountSubjectCode}, erp_asset_type = #{item.erpAssetType}, is_internal = #{item.isInternal}, year = #{item.year}, quarter = #{item.quarter}, currency = #{item.currency}, version = #{item.version}, amount_frozen = #{item.amountFrozen}, amount_frozen_vchanged = #{item.amountFrozenVchanged}, amount_occupied = #{item.amountOccupied}, amount_occupied_vchanged = #{item.amountOccupiedVchanged}, amount_actual = #{item.amountActual}, amount_actual_vchanged = #{item.amountActualVchanged}, amount_available = #{item.amountAvailable}, amount_available_vchanged = #{item.amountAvailableVchanged}, amount_pay_available = #{item.amountPayAvailable}, amount_pay_available_vchanged = #{item.amountPayAvailableVchanged}, updater = #{item.updater}, update_time = SYSTIMESTAMP, deleted = #{item.deleted} WHERE id = #{item.id}
